title: lowia maxillarioides
intro: Lowia maxillarioides, a type of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, is also known as the "Makassar sapan" or "Sarang semut" in some parts of the world. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lowia maxillarioides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and help with respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and roots are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
